---
name: Sponsorship inquiry
about: Discuss sponsoring Motiq or supporting its open-source infrastructure
title: "[Sponsor] "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Organization

Your organization name and website.

## Contact

The best public or business contact for this inquiry. Do not include confidential
payment details, credentials, or other sensitive information in this issue.

## How you would like to support Motiq

For example: financial sponsorship, infrastructure credits, accessibility
services, browser-testing resources, or another open-source partnership.

## Goals

What would make this sponsorship valuable to your organization and the Motiq
community?

## Additional context

Anything else that would help start the conversation.
